category.scope_note: Power tools exported from China compared with Malaysia (ST / SIRIM) requirements for in-scope corded and cordless compliance, EMC-radio scope, noise obligations, battery handling, and market-entry workflow.

title.en: China-to-Malaysia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入马来西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入馬來西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Malaysia ST-SIRIM requirements for CoA, electrical safety, EMC and cordless radio routing, MEPS/energy-voltage context, noisy outdoor-marking handling, and battery constraints versus China GB / GB/T baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具与马来西亚ST-SIRIM、SIRIM QAS、MCMC、海关与MEPS/用电条件要求对比，覆盖电源、EMC、无绳电台、噪声标签、港口通道与电池等方面与中国GB / GB/T基准的差距。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具與馬來西亞ST-SIRIM、SIRIM QAS、MCMC、海關與MEPS/供電條件要求對照，涵蓋電源、EMC、無繩電台、噪聲標籤、港口通道與電池等方面與中國GB / GB/T基準的差距。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, regulator assessment, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Malaysia ST, SIRIM, MCMC, customs, and labour/ environment expectations directly with local authorities before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管评估、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应直接与马来西亚ST、SIRIM、MCMC、海关及劳动与环保监管口径核验当前要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、監管評估、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計審查。出口商與進口商在出貨前應直接向馬來西亞ST、SIRIM、MCMC、海關及勞動與環保監管口徑核驗當前要求。

answer_first.en: For power tools, Malaysia entry is commonly driven by ST-coordinated CoA control through SIRIM QAS with Malaysia-resident importer responsibility, 240 V and 50 Hz suitability evidence, and MCMC handling for wireless or cordless functions where present. There is no EU-style mandatory outdoor-noise power product marking in this lane, and China GB/T evidence still needs Malaysia destination mapping before release.
answer_first.zh: 电动工具进入马来西亚通常走由ST指导、由SIRIM QAS承担的CoA控制路径，并由在地进口商承担目的地责任，需满足240V和50Hz参数、无线/无绳功能与MCMC路径要求。该目标市场无欧盟式户外噪声功率标识强制项，且中国GB/T证据仍需映射到马来西亚目的地要求后才可用于放行。
answer_first.zht: 電動工具進入馬來西亞通常走由ST指導、由SIRIM QAS承擔的CoA控制路徑，並由在地進口商承擔目的地責任，需符合240V與50Hz參數、無線/無繩功能與MCMC路徑要求。該目標市場無歐盟式戶外噪聲功率標識強制項，且中國GB/T證據仍需映射到馬來西亞目的地要求後才可用於放行。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Re-run source checks every quarter and update mandatory_status and official-link evidence after any ST, SIRIM, MCMC, customs, voltage, or labour-law updates.
